title: Golden Dandelion Backport
description: Adds the Golden Dandelion to earlier versions of the game
body:
# Golden Dandelion Backport

![Golden dandelions on the ground](https://github.com/PneumonoIsNotAvailable/GoldenDandelionBackport/blob/master/images/screenshot.png?raw=true)

Adds Golden Dandelions to older versions of the game, specifically 1.21.9-1.21.11. Includes features other backports have missed, such as being sold by Wandering Traders and being craftable into Yellow Dye.
